title: aeschynanthus cuernosensis
intro: Aeschynanthus cuernosensis, also known as the Philippine lip orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Aeschynanthus cuernosensis is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of Aeschynanthus cuernosensis are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant in traditional folk remedies.
